title: Trump Lashes Out at Europe Over Strait of Hormuz, Tells U.K. to ‘Go Get Your Own Oil’
summary_full: President Trump’s latest outbursts followed reports that European countries were imposing more restrictions on American aircraft in their airspace.
summary_public: President Trump’s latest outbursts followed reports that European countries were imposing more restrictions on American aircraft in their airspace.
